description:
Summer/Winter Operating Area: West Mediterranean - Naples / Sicily, West Mediterranean - Spain / Balearics

This 84 Lazzara has had a $400,000 refit in 2022-2023 , which is why this boat looks and runs so great. The wood work and amenities inside this 84 Lazzara are as beautiful as the huge country kitchen featuring a center island that is ready for all your dinning needs. The master bedroom is enormous, and is hotel like with a king size bed and walk in closet, and rivals boats that are 100 feet plus. You can relax in the master bath with its whirlpool tub and double shower and sinks. The additional 3 staterooms for your guests include two queen size bedrooms and one full size bedroom all with their own private bathrooms, giving them total privacy and luxury. The boat comes with a 16 ft walker bay tender designed for water skiing, knee boarding and pulling various water toys that are onboard.. Of course we have fishing poles that we can bring out on the tender or the swim platform of the big boat. If you take the Lazzara out on a multiple day charter, the boat even comes with its own 3 person jet ski. If you are renting the boat for 4-8hrs, then we can rent a jet ski for you at an additional $150/hour. With a hot tub, full wet bar, sunning cushions and plenty of seating on the flybridge, this boat is simply one of the best boats to keep everyone entertained.

The 84 ft Lazzara motor yacht represents a pinnacle of luxury, comfort, and innovation in its class, designed to provide a sophisticated and memorable yachting experience.

Externally, the 80ft Lazzara showcases a sleek and contemporary profile, characterized by clean lines and a distinctive hull design that emphasizes both style and performance. The yacht's exterior spaces are expansive and meticulously finished, featuring teak decking throughout, spacious decks for lounging and sunbathing, and a flybridge that offers panoramic views and additional entertainment areas.

Inside, the 80ft Lazzara exudes elegance and sophistication with its modern interior design and luxurious finishes. The main salon is impressively spacious and beautifully appointed, featuring high-quality materials such as fine woods, marble countertops, and plush furnishings. Large windows and skylights flood the interior with natural light, creating an airy and inviting atmosphere.

Accommodations aboard are designed to pamper guests with comfort and privacy. The yacht typically offers multiple staterooms, each equipped with en-suite bathrooms and luxurious amenities. The master suite is a highlight, providing a spacious retreat with a king-size bed, a private seating area, ample storage space, and sophisticated entertainment systems.

The yacht is equipped with advanced technology and amenities to enhance the onboard experience. This includes state-of-the-art navigation systems, entertainment systems, and a fully equipped galley where gourmet meals can be prepared by the onboard chef. The layout is designed to cater to both relaxation and entertainment, making it ideal for extended cruising or hosting intimate gatherings.

In terms of performance, the 84ft Lazzara is powered by powerful engines that deliver impressive speed and efficiency, ensuring a smooth and exhilarating ride on the open water. The yacht's design and engineering provide excellent handling and stability, allowing for comfortable cruising experiences even in varying sea conditions.

Overall, the 84ft Lazzara motor yacht epitomizes luxury and sophistication, offering a blend of style, comfort, and performance that sets it apart in the world of yachting. It provides a luxurious and unforgettable yachting experience for those who seek the ultimate in maritime luxury and adventure.

blueprint.name: FINALLY-APHRODITE
tenders: 15ft Walker Bay Tender with 75hp ( 2 stroke) engine
